findings.title: Sentinel string-equality is single-source
findings.recommendation: Acceptable: the sentinel value is the documented contract (incr 0728), and there is no second producer of the value. If the platform ever changes its placeholder, the failing tests in version-resolver.test.ts (TC-008..TC-011) will catch the regression. No action required.

scopeAlignment.notes: All 6 tasks complete, all 5 ACs satisfied, no scope creep. Surface limited to version-resolver.ts (+ test), StudioContext.tsx fallback, defensive fallback in 6 display components, and the diagnostic script in vskill-platform. Out-of-scope items in spec.md (platform contract change, scanner re-architecture, DB backfill) explicitly avoided.

evidence.dbCheck: scripts/check-zero-versions.ts confirms 0 zero-version rows in production DB; codex skills at 1.0.0
evidence.e2e: Multiple Playwright specs in vskill/e2e/0756-*.spec.ts; screenshot evidence in reports/ (npx-0.5.128-final.png, studio-after-fix-codex.png, studio-after-fix-personal.png)
evidence.shipped: vskill@0.5.128 published to npm; vskill commit bc299ab on main
